body_excerpt: In set_secure_reg of sac_handler.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure of 4 bytes of stack memory with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
